description: Swap JWT-only auth for active-credential verification on all BM2 API endpoints to revoke access on deactivation
deviation_notes: Review #20 found 3 additional routes (workbooks/capstone, workbooks/[unit]/[lesson], pdfs/[pdfName]) still using getRequestSessionClaims. Fixed to requireActiveRequestSessionClaims with instanceof Response pattern. Total endpoints migrated: 10.
